title: PvPDmgMod
description: The PvP Damage Minimizer mod offers a unique twist to combat in Minecraft by dramatically reducing the damage dealt in player-versus-player encounters. Regardless of the weapon used or the armor worn.
body: The PvP Damage Minimizer mod offers a unique twist to combat in Minecraft by dramatically reducing the damage dealt in player-versus-player encounters. Regardless of the weapon used or the armor worn, all PvP hits inflict a consistent and minimal damage of half a heart. This mod encourages longer and more strategic battles, emphasizing skill and tactics over brute force. Ideal for players who enjoy extended duels and a more balanced fighting experience, the PvP Damage Minimizer mod redefines the way you engage in player combat. Works with existing mod packs.
